resources.string: I am running this on a TEST device, not my primary phone
No banking, payments, or financial apps are open or in the background
No personal data, photos, or sensitive content is visible on screen
I understand a real tap will physically interact with whatever is under the marker, exactly once
I will not use this to bypass app ToS, anti-cheat, captcha, or any automation policy
I understand each session must be started explicitly and ends on Emergency Stop or screen lock
I understand every single real tap requires a fresh 10-second confirmation, no batching
I know how to use Emergency Stop and that it overrides everything
I am not tapping inside someone else\'s app account, profile, or session without explicit permission
I accept full responsibility for any consequence of any tap dispatched from this prototype
